title: feat: implement OAuth 2.0 PKCE authentication flow
body:
## Summary
Implements the OAuth 2.0 authorization code flow with PKCE for browser-based authentication.

## Changes
- Add OAuth 2.0 PKCE client implementation
- Add token refresh logic with encrypted storage
- Add session management middleware

## Related
- PROJ-1234

## Test Plan
- [x] Unit tests for PKCE verifier/challenge generation
- [x] Integration tests for token exchange
- [x] Manual test of full login flow
